finding: The bounded trace captures the first malformed continuation after a valid root/component prefix; subsequent choices continue from the malformed prefix and never recover. legal_candidates is 0 on all captured choices because early picker returns do not update the last-candidate counter, so that field is currently not a trustworthy admission count.
decision: Keep constrained decoding unchanged. First fix selection telemetry to distinguish early legal-argmax/forced/singleton returns from a true zero-candidate path, then use the trace to test the singleton bypass hypothesis.
